text: during the performance period, based on information in the Medicare Provider Enrollment, Chain, and Ownership System (PECOS); (2) reported by the ACO on its attestation list (these records will include both a TIN and CCN on the same line as the NPI); (3) identified by PECOS as a sole proprietor using an ACO participant TIN that has not reassigned its billing rights; or (4) appeared as rendering services on a claim submitted by an ACO participant TIN during the performance period.
